creator: erik@nordstroem.no
text:
Created attachment 176705
Error message shown by Mate when pressing the Fn-button

On my Lenovo ThinkPad T520 running FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2, whenever I press the Fn-button on my keyboard, I get the following error message:

Failure to suspend. Computer failed to suspend. Failure was reported as: Cannot suspend.

Pressing the Fn-button should not trigger this message.

I've attached a screenshot showing the error message quoted above.
